subject: A large, stocky green humanoid in a yellow garment charges forward through a burst of energy
description: A large, broad-bodied green-skinned humanoid figure with a round, powerful build charges forward through an explosive burst of yellow and gold energy. The figure wears a yellow or gold garment, and the body's sheer mass is the defining visual feature — wide-shouldered, thick-limbed, and heavy. The energy burst radiates outward in all directions from the figure's position, creating an explosive charge composition. The background is completely consumed by the energy eruption — gold, yellow, and white tones. The composition is a mid-shot with the figure centered and pushing toward the viewer. The mood is brutish and overwhelming.
foreground: large stocky green humanoid in yellow garment charging through energy burst
background: explosive gold and yellow energy burst consuming the frame
emotion: overwhelming aggression — sheer bulk driving forward, no finesse
